title: ACE Unveils E15 Cost Calculator at CFCA Summit
content: With California on the cusp of approving sales of E15, the American Coalition for Ethanol (ACE) introduced a powerful new tool this week at the California Fuels + Convenience Alliance (CFCA) Summit to help fuel marketers seize the opportunity: the E15 Cost Calculator, now live at FlexFuelForward.com, ACEâ€™s digital hub tailored to fuel marketers. The online calculator equips retailers with a resource to plug in real-time data to compare the costs and potential profits of selling E15 versus E10.t provides station-specific insights, including applicable state and federal tax credits, to show whether offering E15 can boost the bottom line.
author: Analysts Account
